---
title: ""
format:
  html:
    theme: minty
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
    smooth-scroll: true
    title-block-banner: false
sidebar: false
---

```{=html}
<style>

/* ===== NAVBAR ===== */

.navbar{
  background-color:#0b3d2e !important;
  border-bottom:1px solid #14532d;
}

.navbar-brand,
.navbar a{
  color:white !important;
  font-weight:600;
}

.navbar a:hover{
  color:#bbf7d0 !important;
}

/* ===== GENERAL ===== */

body{
  background: linear-gradient(to bottom right, #eefbf3, #dff5e7);
  font-family:'Segoe UI', sans-serif;
  color:#1f2937;
}

main.content{
  padding-top:12px !important;
}

/* ===== HERO ===== */

.hero{
  background: linear-gradient(135deg,#14532d,#22c55e);
  color:white;
  padding:60px 40px;
  border-radius:22px;
  text-align:center;
  margin-bottom:24px;
  box-shadow:0px 8px 28px rgba(0,0,0,0.12);
}

.hero h1{
  font-size:3rem;
  font-weight:800;
  margin-bottom:10px;
}

.hero p{
  max-width:720px;
  margin:auto;
  font-size:1.05rem;
  line-height:1.7;
  opacity:0.96;
}

/* ===== CARDS ===== */

.card-box{
  background:white;
  border-radius:18px;
  padding:24px;
  box-shadow:0px 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.06);
  border:1px solid #dcfce7;
  margin-bottom:18px;
  transition:0.25s ease;
}

.card-box:hover{
  transform:translateY(-4px);
  box-shadow:0px 8px 20px rgba(34,197,94,0.14);
}

.card-box h2{
  color:#166534;
  font-size:1.4rem;
  margin-bottom:14px;
}

/* ===== TAGS ===== */

.tag{
  display:inline-block;
  background:#dcfce7;
  color:#166534;
  padding:8px 14px;
  border-radius:999px;
  margin:5px;
  font-size:0.92rem;
  font-weight:600;
}

/* ===== BUTTON ===== */

.cv-button{
  display:inline-block;
  background:#15803d;
  color:white !important;
  padding:12px 22px;
  border-radius:12px;
  text-decoration:none !important;
  font-weight:600;
  transition:0.25s;
  margin-top:10px;
}

.cv-button:hover{
  background:#166534;
  transform:translateY(-2px);
}

/* ===== FOOTER ===== */

.footer{
  text-align:center;
  margin-top:28px;
  padding:12px;
  color:#166534;
  font-size:0.95rem;
}

</style>

::: {.hero}

About Me

Industrial Engineering Student • Data Analytics Enthusiast • Research-Oriented Thinker

I am passionate about using data-driven insights to optimize processes, support decision-making, and solve complex engineering problems.

:::

::: {.card-box}

Professional Bio

I am Yusuf Bora Çavdar, a 3rd-year Industrial Engineering student at Hacettepe University, expected to graduate in 2026.

My primary academic interests focus on:

Data Science
Data Analytics
Process Optimization
Statistical Analysis
Decision Support Systems

I am especially interested in the applications of analytics within Human Resources, particularly in Training and Development.

Additionally, I have a strong interest in Lean and Six Sigma methodologies.

:::

::: {.card-box}

Areas of Interest

<span class="tag">Data Analytics</span>
<span class="tag">Machine Learning</span>
<span class="tag">Lean Six Sigma</span>
<span class="tag">Statistical Modeling</span>
<span class="tag">Human Resources Analytics</span>
<span class="tag">Process Improvement</span>

:::

::: {.card-box}

Activities & Personal Development
📚 Financial Literacy Society

Active member interested in financial management and economic analysis.

🌲 Scouting

Focused on leadership, teamwork, discipline, and outdoor skills through scouting activities.

🇩🇪 Language Learning

Currently learning German to improve international communication and professional opportunities.

:::

::: {.card-box}

Curriculum Vitae

You can find my detailed academic background, experiences, and achievements in my CV.

<a href="files/cv.pdf" class="cv-button">Download CV (PDF)</a>

:::

<div class="footer">

Made with 💚 using R and Quarto

</div> ```
